violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The bottom of the white fridge under the drawers need to be cleaned.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. The hood system needs to be cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Duct tape on wall by water heater. Broken tile on the floor by the dishwasher.
